'''Karra''' was the [[Karran]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. It was briefly colonized by the [[Mineral Assets Partnership]] in [[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]]. Later, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established [[varmigio]] [[Mining/Legends|mines]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Both offworld settlements were destroyed by swarms of [[Insect/Legends|insects]] controlled by the Karran [[Hive mind/Legends|hive mind]].

Karra had a diverse array of insectoid fauna, including [[swarmer]]s, [[karran beetle]]s, [[karran mantis]]es, and [[legworm]]s.
